hero.name: ARVINDHAN
hero.description: Class 12 Student @ Sandipani Vidyalaya | IoT Systems Engineer | Full-Stack Developer

about.bio: I am a Class 12 student at Sandipani Vidyalaya, formerly achieving academic excellence at Jawahar Vidyalaya (up to Class 10). My work lies at the intersection of Condensed Matter Physics and Embedded Systems. I don't just learn theory; I apply it to build integrated IoT solutions, from environmental drone payloads to secure communication platforms.
about.personal_story: My journey began with a curiosity about the fundamental laws of the universe. This drove me to explore how physics principles govern electronics. Today, I actively research topics like Quantum Mechanics and Thermodynamics while prototyping practical hardware solutions.

detailed_bio.content: Specializing in end-to-end IoT architecture. I bridge the gap between physical sensors and cloud intelligence, primarily using the ESP32 ecosystem and MicroPython.
Deeply fascinated by Condensed Matter Physics and Quantum Mechanics. I spend my time exploring how material properties at the atomic level can be leveraged for better electronic systems.
My 5+ years in formal art training isn't separate from my engineering; it informs my UI design and hardware spatial planning, ensuring everything I build is as aesthetic as it is functional.

timeline.desc: Studying at Sandipani Vidyalaya. Focusing on core Physics/Math fundamentals. Building advanced electronics prototypes and preparing for Olympiads.
Completed the IITM Online Course on Electronic Systems (6-week intensive). Focused on embedded system design, circuit analysis, and hardware-software integration.
Completed the IITM Data Science Course (6-week intensive). Gained proficiency in statistical modeling, data visualization, and Python-based analytics.
Winner (1st Place): School Project Competition for GAIA Sentinel (IoT Drone System). Developed OOP Python projects and basic hardware prototypes.
Completed Class 10 at Jawahar Vidyalaya with distinction (476/500 - 95.2%). Established strong fundamentals in Physics and Math.

projects.title: GAIA Sentinel
projects.description: A pioneering autonomous environmental monitoring system. GAIA Sentinel integrates ESP32-based drone payloads with a ground sensor network to capture real-time, hyper-local air quality (MQ135) and water quality data. The system features cloud telemetry for instant data visualization and analysis, designed to aid in rapid environmental assessment.

projects.title: Secure Messenger
projects.description: Real-time group messaging platform featuring End-to-End encryption and admin data visualization.

projects.title: Study Companion
projects.description: Integrated productivity suite with Pomodoro timer, Lofi music player, and task management tools.

library.title: The Inheritance Games
library.author: Jennifer Lynn Barnes
library.brief: A masterclass in logic and puzzles. Reminds me that every problem has a solution if you look at it from the right angle.

library.title: Beach Read
library.author: Emily Henry
library.brief: A refreshing break from the code. Sometimes you need a good narrative to reset the creative brain.

library.title: The Silent Patient
library.author: Alex Michaelides
library.brief: Psychological depth and unexpected twists. Taught me to question assumptions, a skill crucial in debugging.

library.title: Dune
library.author: Frank Herbert
library.brief: The ultimate world-building masterpiece. The intersection of ecology, politics, and technology is fascinating.

library.title: Sapiens
library.author: Yuval Noah Harari
library.brief: Understanding where we came from helps predict where technology is taking us. A perspective shift on humanity.
